title: Slightly Better Sheep
description: Slightly Alters The Sheep's Model, Giving It a Snout. Works With Most Other Resource Packs.
body:
Requires a CEM mod like [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) to work

### About
In 1.21.5, Mojang changed the cow’s model and gave it a snout, making the sheep the only animal with a flat face. This resource pack changes that.

### Version Info
In versions before 1.21.5, the pack doesn’t change any textures and should work with any pack that doesn’t modify the sheep’s model.

For 1.21.5 and later, it works with most packs that change the sheep’s texture, but it doesn’t show a difference between different colours when sheared.
